variant.hypothesis: H1: in a liquid quality-filtered A-share universe, buying confirmed pullbacks inside established uptrends (close>=MA200 rising; RSI dip<=40 turning up; volume-confirmed reclaim of MA5) with stop/trend-break/time-stop exits produces post-cost same-gross alpha vs CSI300 and EW at the 20d horizon.
variant.causal_logic_label: unestablished (structured falsifiable prior; NOT a known edge)
expected_failure_modes: turnover x 0.40% RT cost dominates the signal (the proven killer)
pullback-in-uptrend is just momentum beta in disguise -> dies post-2015 like momentum
uptrend filter lags regime turns -> whipsaw entries at tops
alpha confined to one regime window (2006-2010), like the dead inverse-momentum

test_plan.claim_gate: ci_positive_after_cost vs CSI300 AND EW + WF1 + OOS-not-sig-neg + 19-gate
